required_scope.name: entity
required_scope.description: ShareChat entity name. Finny resolves to NetSuite IDs at execute time using her brain — do NOT pin to a static enum, since the entity list changes when ShareChat acquires or restructures.

required_scope.name: consolidated
required_scope.description: If true, includes all subsidiaries rolled up. If false, the named entity is reported standalone.

required_scope.name: period
required_scope.description: Reporting window. Object with from / to in YYYY-MM-DD.

required_scope.name: env
required_scope.description: NetSuite environment. Sign conventions are FLIPPED between sandbox and production — never silently switch.

optional_scope.name: comparison_period
optional_scope.description: If supplied, adds a prior-period column for variance analysis.

entries.scope_doc: Profit & loss aggregated by GL account for the resolved entity over period. Honor consolidated flag (true=roll up subsidiaries; false=standalone). Apply ShareChat sign conventions per MEMORY.md 'NetSuite rules' section — sandbox and production have flipped signs. Open-balance components are NOT part of P&L. Group rows by GL account; preserve money decimal places.

required_scope.name: vendor_ref
required_scope.description: Either NetSuite vendor_id (preferred) or vendor_name. If vendor_name resolves to multiple vendors and gstin is absent, return needs_input with the candidates.

required_scope.name: env
required_scope.description: NetSuite environment. Sign conventions flipped between sandbox and production.

optional_scope.name: as_of_date
optional_scope.description: Compute the balance as of this date instead of today.

optional_scope.name: gstin
optional_scope.description: Disambiguator when vendor_name has multiple matches and the caller knows the GSTIN.

entries.scope_doc: Open balance = VendBill (status IN ('A','D')) + VPrep + Journal + BillCredit per MEMORY.md. NEVER use status='A' alone — D (drafts) are also open. If vendor_name resolves to multiple vendors and gstin is absent, return status: 'needs_input' with the matching candidates as options. Apply env-specific sign convention. GSTIN comes from REST taxRegistration, not SuiteQL.

required_scope.name: as_of_date
required_scope.description: Snapshot date for the cash balance.

optional_scope.name: by_account
optional_scope.description: If true, break out per bank account; otherwise return total.

entries.scope_doc: Snapshot cash + cash-equivalent GL balances as of the given date. The canonical cash GL set lives in MEMORY.md. If by_account=true, return rows envelope (account, balance); otherwise scalar (total). Apply env-specific sign conventions. Do NOT include AR or VendBill — those are receivables/payables, not cash.

required_scope.name: transaction_id
required_scope.description: Internal NetSuite ID of the transaction.

entries.scope_doc: Single-record fetch by NetSuite transaction type + internal ID. Return narrative envelope rendering the record's key fields (preserve money decimal places, dates in NetSuite native format, GSTIN as-is). For VendBill, surface bill_date, due_date, vendor_ref, total, and status code (A=open approved, D=draft, etc.) explicitly.
